title: penstemon glandulosus var. glandulosus
intro: Penstemon glandulosus var. glandulosus, commonly known as Sticky Penstemon or Globe Mallow, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon glandulosus var. glandulosus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of asthma, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health and soothe irritated mucous membranes.
